nodes.name: Trigger: Daily 06:00 Madrid
nodes.notes: Fires Monday-Friday at 06:00 Europe/Madrid to fetch economic calendar before trading session

nodes.name: Fetch: ForexFactory Calendar
nodes.notes: Primary fetch from fallback JSON source (more reliable than scraping ForexFactory directly). nfs.faireconomy.media provides the same FF calendar data in JSON format.

nodes.name: Format: Filter & Style
nodes.notes: Filters events to HIGH/MEDIUM impact only, plus always-included key events (FOMC, NFP, CPI, etc.). Formats output in Spanish trading format.

nodes.name: Save: To Cache File
nodes.notes: Saves formatted calendar to cache file for persistence and webhook access

nodes.name: Webhook: GET calendar-today
nodes.notes: Exposes the cached calendar via GET /webhook/calendar-today for trading agent access

nodes.name: Fetch: ForexFactory (Primary)
nodes.notes: Fallback: Direct ForexFactory scrape. This may fail due to bot detection, hence the nfs.faireconomy.media JSON as primary.

nodes.name: Error Handler: Fetch Fail
nodes.notes: If fetch fails, return user-friendly error message instead of breaking the workflow
